keyMappings:
# Insert your preferred key mappings here.

unmap H
unmap L
map H goBack
map L goForward

unmap <c-h>
unmap <c-l>
map <c-h> previousTab
map <c-l> nextTab

unmap d
unmap u
map <c-d> scrollPageDown
map <c-u> scrollPageUp
map <c-f> scrollFullPageDown
map <c-b> scrollFullPageUp

#map i LinkHints.activateMode
#map I LinkHints.activateModeToOpenInNewTab

unmap x
map dd removeTab
unmap X
map <c-r> restoreTab
map u restoreTab
searchEngines:
w: http://ja.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Special:Search&search=%s Wikipedia
we: http://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Special:Search&search=%s Wikipedia@En

y: http://www.youtube.jp/results?search_query=%s Youtube

a: http://www.amazon.co.jp/s/?field-keywords=%s Amazon

gen: https://www.google.com/search?gl=us&hl=en&source=hp&q=%s Google English
gs: https://scholar.google.co.jp/scholar?q=%s Google Scholar
gm: https://www.google.com/maps?q=%s Google Maps
gi: http://www.google.co.jp/search?hl=ja&source=hp&q=%s&tbm=isch Google 画像検索

t: https://translate.google.com/#en/ja/%s Google 翻訳 | en -> jp
ten: https://translate.google.com/#en/ja/%s Google 翻訳 | en -> jp
tjp: https://translate.google.com/#ja/en/%s Google 翻訳 | jp -> en

q: https://qiita.com/search?q=%s Qiita
qs: https://qiita.com/search?stocked=1&q=%s Qiita stock

github: https://github.com/search?utf8=%E2%9C%93&q=%s GitHub Repo.
mygithub: https://github.com/search?utf8=%E2%9C%93&q=user%3Aopenjny+%s GitHub My Repo.

arxiv: https://arxiv.org/search/advanced?advanced=&terms-0-operator=AND&terms-0-term=%s&terms-0-field=all&classification-computer_science=y&classification-physics_archives=all&classification-statistics=y&date-filter_by=past_12&date-year=2018&date-from_date=&date-to_date=&size=50&order=-submitted_date arXiv newest
